  "findings": [
    "Single-wall vent connector lacks the required 6-inch clearance to combustible materials."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Shut down the furnace if immediate fire hazard exists, or schedule immediate rework to establish the minimum 6-inch clearance or replace with Type B double-wall vent requiring 1-inch clearance."
  ],
  "rationale": "Single-wall metal pipe vent connectors for gas appliances must maintain a minimum clearance of 6 inches to combustible materials under IRC M1801 and NFPA 54. Failure to maintain this clearance poses a severe fire hazard during furnace operation.",
  "references": [
    "IRC Section M1803.3.4",
    "NFPA 54 Chapter 12"
  ]
}
